name: Low-Fat Shrimp Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the chopped eggs and water chestnuts.
2. Add the kraft non-fat mayo to the bowl and mix well.
3. Add the cooked shrimp to the bowl and gently fold until combined.
4. Stir in the lemon juice, celery, and dried dillweed or curry.
5. Chill thoroughly before serving.
